title: Meteor
description: HD SEUSPBR textures and fancy models
body:
Meteor is a realistic HD resource pack that uses the old SEUSPBR material standard, OptiFine connected & emissive textures and a few fancy custom models. Most textures are based on assets from [ambientCG](https://ambientcg.com/) (❤️) and edited to more closely match the appearance of Vanilla Minecraft.

The PBR features require [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or a compatible shader loader like [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), and a shader pack that supports SEUSPBR, such as [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined). The connected and emissive textures require [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or a compatible mod like [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity).

**This resource pack is not complete and development is currently paused**. If you would like to get the higher resolution versions from my Patreon, I therefore recommend that you become a patron and then cancel your membership after downloading the pack ([Editing your membership - Patreon Help Center](https://support.patreon.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000126286-How-to-change-your-tier-a-guide-for-members#h_01EPWHKBX8XBBDQ125YJVJNSTP)). I also recommend that you try the free 256x version before becoming a patron.

## Recommended Configuration

* OptiFine
  * Alternate Blocks: OFF
  * Emissive Textures: ON
  * Normal Map: ON
  * Specular Map: ON
* Complementary Reimagined
  * RP Support: SEUSPBR
* RenderPearl (newer versions only)
  * RP Specular Map Roughness: On
    * Channel: R
    * Type: Perceptual Smoothness
  * Normals: RP Normal Maps

---

> Created using assets from [ambientCG.com](https://ambientcg.com/), licensed under the Creative Commons CC0 1.0 Universal License.
